problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: If Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins is applied to it, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
